annotations.label: Radius of curvature equals normal length

annotations.label: Roulette of parabola focus is a catenary

anchor.snippet: When a parabola is rolled along a straight line, the roulette curve traced by its focus is a catenary

annotations.label: Envelope of parabola directrix is a catenary

anchor.snippet: The envelope of the directrix of the parabola is also a catenary

annotations.label: Involute of catenary from vertex is the tractrix

anchor.snippet: The involute from the vertex, that is the roulette traced by a point starting at the vertex when a line is rolled on a catenary, is the tractrix

annotations.label: Rolling line on catenary gives another line

anchor.snippet: Another roulette, formed by rolling a line on a catenary, is another line

annotations.label: Square wheels roll on inverted catenaries

anchor.snippet: square wheels can roll perfectly smoothly on a road made of a series of bumps in the shape of an inverted catenary curve
Over any horizontal interval, the ratio of the area under the catenary to its length equals a , independent of the interval selected

annotations.label: Catenary is unique with constant area-to-length ratio

anchor.snippet: The catenary is the only plane curve other than a horizontal line with this property
the geometric centroid of the area under a stretch of catenary is the midpoint of the perpendicular segment connecting the centroid of the curve itself and the x -axis

annotations.label: Charge in uniform electric field traces a catenary

anchor.snippet: A moving charge in a uniform electric field travels along a catenary

annotations.label: Catenoid is the minimum surface of revolution

anchor.snippet: The surface of revolution with fixed radii at either end that has minimum surface area is a catenary

In a catenary of equal strength, the cable is strengthened according to the magnitude of the tension at each point, so its resistance to breaking is constant along its length
